title: Building an archive from fragments of work and daily life.
summary: A long-form project entry can hold images, embedded video, field notes, sketches, dates, locations, and process records together without turning everything into the same kind of post.

title: Streaming interfaces and visual pacing.
summary: Digital product work presented with context, narrative, and visual rhythm instead of only screen captures.

title: Images gathered through movement and place.
summary: Travel and daily observation can live beside commissioned work when the archive is arranged by sequence and memory.

title: Essays, captions, notes, and process records.
summary: Short text and long text should share the same editorial system so that notes feel as intentional as finished projects.
